description: Patrowl provides external attack surface management and continuous automated penetration testing services. Its platform helps organizations discover internet-facing assets, detect vulnerabilities, and route findings into security and IT workflows.
summary: Patrowl exposes one documented developer surface: a Patrowl Dashboard HTTP API (v1) authenticated with a Patrowl-issued API access token; no public evidence of GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces was found on patrowl.io.
